_README: Phase 0 hand-curated data. Every number marked _verify=true needs a human check before posting publicly. Sources to use: Zillow ZORI / RentCast for rent, Google Maps at 8am Tuesday for commute, SDG&E residential rate calc for utilities, CDSS Regional Market Rate survey for childcare.

92008.name: Carlsbad (Village/Barrio)
92008.rent_source: WEB-SOURCED 2026-07-03: ApartmentList Jul-2026 (1BR $2,794 / 2BR $3,172 citywide, Village/Barrio older stock adj. down) + RentCafe Feb-2026 (1BR $2,873 / 2BR $3,380 / 3BR $4,023)
92008.rent_confidence: medium - listing-site medians, cross-check vs ZORI CSV / RentCast before flipping _verify
92008.sdge_note: Electric-only est. 2026-07-03; typical SDG&E bill ~$185-235/mo, coastal lower/inland higher. Gas adds ~$40-90 winter.
92008.verify_remaining: none blocking - optional: personally re-run pairs cited in launch post
92008.commute_source: Live Google Maps data (AI-relayed), Tue 8:00 AM depart, pulled 2026-07-03
92008.commute_confidence: high - live nav data; AI-relayed, eyeball headline pairs before public claims

cost_constants.vehicle_cost_note: IRS 2026 standard mileage rate, 72.5 cents/mi (Notice 2026-10, eff. Jan 1 2026). Verified 2026-07-03.
cost_constants.time_value_note: Commute hours valued at 50% of stated hourly wage - defensible per DOT valuation-of-travel-time convention. Tune later.
cost_constants.childcare_note: Verified 2026-07-03: SD County licensed-center median = $19,981/yr infant (~$1,665/mo), preschool ~$1,000-1,600/mo (CA Child Care Portfolio May-2025 via kidsdata/TOOTRiS). $1,550 = blended under-5 figure. Cross-check CDSS RMR + YMCA CRS zip-level table.
